heading: Response Document
body:
The response JSON (Javascript Object Notation) document includes an array of your latest
**targets** from which to scrape and a document containing their
**labels**.

| Name    | Type             | Description                                                                  |
| ------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| targets | array of objects | Each host and port from which to scrape metrics.                             |
| labels  | document         | Document that contains the label and value that differentiates your metrics. |
